name: Controlled Pure Vanilla Cookie
description:
✦ | Shadow Milk Cookie has taken over Pure Vanilla Cookie

Pure Vanilla and the other had fight against Shadow Milk Cookie, who was able to break free of the Silver Tree Seal. As Shadow Milk Cookie was close to being defeated, he used his magic to move his soul into the Soul Jam of Pure Vanilla Cookie-Now they share a single body and their minds are combined.

Picture from "chewy_cloudd" on X
creator: Azureebloom
